FUNDNG_SRC_NON_FED_SHR_CD 
LABEL: 
Funding Source Non-Federal Share Code 
DESCRIPTION: A code to indicate the type of non-federal share used by the state to finance its expenditure to the 
provider.

LONG NAME: FUNDNG_SRC_NON_FED_SHR_CD

CHAR
